pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh local server setup
Task description and hardcoded TLE object ID in setup_task.sh
Task description explicitly requires Latitude = 45.4215 N
Task description explicitly requires Longitude = 75.6972 W
Task description explicitly requires Altitude = 70 meters
Task description explicitly requires tracking module named LEOP_Tracking

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env leop_custom_tle_ingestion task by confirming that the TLE data is synthetically hosted via a local Python HTTP server on port 8080. The underlying TLE belongs to real NORAD ID 47438 (UVSQ-SAT) but is synthetically relabeled as 'TECHSAT-1'. All metadata parameters regarding the TLE URL, satellite ID, Ottawa ground station coordinates (45.4215 N, -75.6972 W, 70m), and target tracking module name ('LEOP_Tracking') perfectly match the task instructions and setup scripts. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
